name: amind-hero
title: Amind Hero
description: Inspired by the mymind website — purely as a creative reference for fellow developers, no affiliation or commercial intent. Features a blurred radial gradient backdrop, white circle overlay, colorful tag bubbles, animated entrance transitions, app store buttons, and an auto-playing product video.
